PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FONG, TOMMY LAU, RICKY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUERRA, JOAN $2,920.44 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,920.44, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR; PLAINTIFF TOMMY FONG TO RECOVER $1019.56 PLUS $178.42; DEFENDANT RICKY LAU TO RECOVER $1722.88. STATUTORY COSTS ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFFS.
MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $118.00 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE FEB-19-1998, FILED BY PLAINTIFF FONG, TOMMY LAU, RICKY
STIPULATION AND ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT JUDGMENT OF JAN-26-1998 SET ASIDE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
